message:
docs(models): correct misleading fallback comment in run_models_status

The original comment claimed top-level JSON fields fall back to a
"MiniLM-shaped placeholder" when the policy selects "hash". The actual
code emits the active-model fields only when an active model exists —
nothing is inserted in hash mode. The shipped behavior is correct
(consumers can read `policy_quality_tier_embedder` to detect hash
mode). The comment was just wrong about what the code does.

Updated to document the actual semantics: top-level active-model
fields are present iff there's an active model; consumers should
fall back to `policy_quality_tier_embedder` + `models[*]` to see the
full picture in hash or unrecognized-embedder modes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
